description: Dutch train-derived MFR dictionary for MultiLexNorm-style lexical normalization. Use high_confidence_pairs for automatic replacement; send review/ambiguous pairs to target-token prompt/model fallback.

thresholds.high_confidence_pairs: count>=3, top_norm_confidence>=0.80, top_norm/raw_total>=0.50, protected/context-sensitive tokens excluded unless listed in allow_short_auto
thresholds.balanced_pairs: count>=2, top_norm_confidence>=0.75, top_norm/raw_total>=0.45; provided for analysis only
